rationale: In the citing paper, Chevalier and Mayzlin (2006) appears only in an introductory grouped citation supporting a general background claim that negative online chatter can be especially informative for firm outcomes. The paper does not give this source a distinct role in theory development, hypothesis construction, modeling, or interpretation beyond that broad framing point. There is no clear evidence that the citing study directly builds on or applies this specific paper's design or findings.
